name: Do reviews help with voice search rankings for local SEO?
description: Yes. Reviews help build trust and reinforce that your business is active and credible, which matters for local voice answers.

mainEntity.name: Do reviews help with voice search rankings for local SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reviews matter because they add trust signals and fresh local evidence that a business is active and credible. Frequent, genuine reviews with owner responses can help reinforce relevance, especially when people ask for the best option nearby.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Reviews help build trust and reinforce that your business is active and credible, which matters for local voice answers.
